nasb.text: He walked in the way of the kings of Israel, just as the house of Ahab did (for Ahab’s daughter was his wife), and he did evil in the sight of the Lord.

esv.text: And he walked in the way of the kings of Israel, as the house of Ahab had done, for the daughter of Ahab was his wife. And he did what was evil in the sight of the Lord.

cnv.text: 他隨從眾以色列王的道路，好像亞哈家所行的一樣，因為他娶了亞哈的女兒作妻子，行耶和華看為惡的事。

ccb.text: 他与亚哈家一样步以色列诸王的后尘，因为他娶了亚哈的女儿为妻，做耶和华视为恶的事。
